title: School Election 2001, National Study
description: "School election 2001, nationwide opinion poll" is a national opinion poll (telephone interview) carried out by the Norwegian Gallup Institute AS on behalf of Sikt - Norwegian Agency for Shared Services in Education and Research (then Norwegian Social Science Data Service AS (NSD)). The questions included in the poll are the same as those asked to upper secondary school students in the 2001 school choice survey.
